mapper.select:
SELECT task.id AS taskId, ai.id AS instanceId, ai.business_id AS businessId, ai.start_time AS initiatedStartTime, business.start_time AS startTime, business.end_time AS endTime, business.reason AS reason, ai.`status` AS status, ai.start_user_name AS startUserName
-- 教师请假 ,business.leave_type AS leaveType
FROM act_approval_task task INNER JOIN act_approval_instance ai ON task.instance_id = ai.id INNER JOIN act_process_definition apd ON ai.definition_id = apd.id INNER JOIN act_process_template apt ON apd.template_id = apt.id
-- 教师请假 INNER JOIN teacher_leave business ON business.id = ai.business_id
-- 教师公务 INNER JOIN teacher_business business ON business.id = ai.business_id
WHERE task.deleted = 0 AND task.`status` = 0
AND business.school_id = #{schoolId}
AND apt.process_type = #{reqModel.processType}
AND JSON_CONTAINS(task.approver_ids, '#{userId}', '$')
AND ai.start_user_id = #{reqModel.teacherId}
AND business.start_time <= CONCAT(#{reqModel.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND business.end_time >= CONCAT(#{reqModel.startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
ORDER BY task.create_time DESC

SELECT ai.id AS instanceId, ai.business_id AS businessId, ai.start_time AS initiatedStartTime, ai.end_time AS completeTime, business.start_time AS startTime, business.end_time AS endTime, business.reason AS reason, ai.`status` AS status, ai.start_user_name AS startUserName
-- 教师请假 ,business.leave_type AS leaveType
FROM act_approval_instance ai INNER JOIN act_process_definition apd ON ai.definition_id = apd.id INNER JOIN act_process_template apt ON apd.template_id = apt.id
INNER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT instance_id FROM act_approval_history WHERE operate_user_id = #{userId} ) aah ON ai.id = aah.instance_id
-- 教师请假 LEFT JOIN teacher_leave business ON business.id = ai.business_id
-- 教师公务 LEFT JOIN teacher_business business ON business.id = ai.business_id
WHERE ai.deleted = 0
AND business.school_id = #{schoolId}
AND apt.process_type = #{reqModel.processType}
AND ai.start_user_id = #{reqModel.teacherId}
AND business.start_time <= CONCAT(#{reqModel.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND business.end_time >= CONCAT(#{reqModel.startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
ORDER BY ai.create_time DESC

SELECT ai.id AS instanceId, ai.business_id AS businessId, ai.start_time AS initiatedStartTime, ai.end_time AS completeTime, business.start_time AS startTime, business.end_time AS endTime, business.reason AS reason, ai.`status` AS status, ai.start_user_name AS startUserName
-- 教师请假 ,business.leave_type AS leaveType
FROM act_approval_instance ai INNER JOIN act_process_definition apd ON ai.definition_id = apd.id INNER JOIN act_process_template apt ON apd.template_id = apt.id
-- 教师请假 INNER JOIN teacher_leave business ON business.id = ai.business_id
-- 教师公务 INNER JOIN teacher_business business ON business.id = ai.business_id
WHERE ai.deleted = 0 AND ai.status = 2
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT instance_id FROM act_approval_history WHERE operate_user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT instance_id FROM act_approval_cc WHERE cc_user_id = #{userId} ) combined WHERE combined.instance_id = ai.id )
AND business.school_id = #{schoolId}
AND apt.process_type = #{reqModel.processType}
AND ai.start_user_id = #{reqModel.teacherId}
AND business.start_time <= CONCAT(#{reqModel.endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
AND business.end_time >= CONCAT(#{reqModel.startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
ORDER BY ai.create_time DESC
